_comment: Recorded spec-ACP frame sequence representative of a codex-acp session turn, reconciled with the REAL codex-acp 0.15.0 wire contract observed during live validation (2026-05-31). The real lifecycle is initialize -> authenticate (env_var method; codex-acp rejects session/new with -32000 'Authentication required' until an auth method is selected) -> session/new (requires cwd+mcpServers) -> session/prompt (requires sessionId + a ContentBlock array prompt) with a session/update text chunk + a tool_call notification + a session/request_permission request -> terminal stopReason. Used by the fixture-replay agent in codex_test.go to drive the broker through the Protocol+Acceptance gates without a live codex-acp install. The live form records a REAL codex-acp session in staging (operator-run M5); this fixture is the in-process wire-truth anchor.
